hypothesis: When no unused role-compatible scalar string slot remains, routing away from a repeated visible placeholder to a legal literal will prevent Form-subtree placeholder spam.

prediction_evidence.held_out_form_01: Byte-identical to E694: hint.title remains reused in Form, Button, and FormControl, so placeholder_semantic_role_mismatch and placeholder_spam remain.
prediction_evidence.held_out_input_01: The previously safe empty Input name becomes the arbitrary literal itet.
prediction_evidence.held_out_settings_01: The previously stable SwitchGroup name becomes the arbitrary literal itet.
prediction_evidence.excluded_r1: The fixed empty-literal target was unavailable in live constrained candidate sets, so all five predictions were byte-identical to E694.

decision: Reject v153/v154 and restore v152 behavior as v155. Literal routing does not solve instance ownership and can replace stable operational values with arbitrary generated strings.
